openai_output.name: mcd_query
openai_output.arguments:
{"sql":"with vals as (
  select cast(replace(replace(c5,'$',''),',','') as real) as below_inv_grade_amortized_cost
  from multihiertt_table_rows
  where example_id='MHDEV-0006' and table_index=1 and row_index in (6,7,8,9,10,12)
), avg2004 as (
  select cast(replace(replace(c5,'$',''),',','') as real) as v
  from multihiertt_table_rows
  where example_id='MHDEV-0006' and table_index=1 and row_index=7
)
select (select v from avg2004) as threshold, count(*) as exceed_count
from vals
where below_inv_grade_amortized_cost > (select v from avg2004)","output":"dict"}
